L

lastLogin - Variable in class com.rays.dto.UserDTO
The timestamp of the user's last successful login.
lastName - Variable in class com.rays.dto.FacultyDTO
The last name of the faculty member.
lastName - Variable in class com.rays.dto.StudentDTO
The last name of the student.
lastName - Variable in class com.rays.dto.UserDTO
The last name of the user.

The last name of the faculty member.

lastName - Variable in class com.rays.form.StudentForm
 
lastName - Variable in class com.rays.form.UserForm
 
lastName - Variable in class com.rays.form.UserRegistrationForm
 
loadUserByUsername(String) - Method in class com.rays.service.JWTUserDetailsService
Loads user details by username (login) for authentication.
login - Variable in class com.rays.dto.UserDTO
The login ID (typically email) of the user.
login - Variable in class com.rays.form.ChangePasswordForm
The login ID (typically email) of the user requesting the password change.
login - Variable in class com.rays.form.ForgetPasswordForm
 
login - Variable in class com.rays.form.LoginForm
 
login - Variable in class com.rays.form.MyProfileForm
 
login - Variable in class com.rays.form.UserForm
 
login - Variable in class com.rays.form.UserRegistrationForm
 
login(LoginForm, BindingResult) - Method in class com.rays.ctl.LoginCtl
Authenticates a user with the provided login credentials and returns a JWT token.
LoginCtl - Class in com.rays.ctl
REST controller for handling authentication-related operations in the ORS application.
LoginCtl() - Constructor for class com.rays.ctl.LoginCtl
 
LoginForm - Class in com.rays.form
Form class for handling user login requests.
LoginForm() - Constructor for class com.rays.form.LoginForm
 
loginId - Variable in class com.rays.common.UserContext
The login ID (typically email) of the logged-in user.
logout(HttpSession) - Method in class com.rays.ctl.LoginCtl
Logs out the currently authenticated user by invalidating the HTTP session.
